step_rationale: Upregulated in CAD urinary exosomes; protease inhibitor in inflammatory/thrombotic remodeling.
mechanism: SERPINA5 upregulation in CAD reflects heightened proteolytic and inflammatory activity destabilizing plaques.

references.title: A comprehensive proteomic profiling of urinary exosomes and the identification of early non-invasive biomarker in patients with coronary artery disease.
Early identification of acute myocardial infarction by activated protein C--protein C inhibitor complex.
